channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Overgrown grass in field south of Play area south of Hucclecote RFC, 22nd June
item.description:
Been like that several weeks or in some areas months now
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Buscombe Rise, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 22nd June
item.description:
FW Abrupt Level Difference 3000mm x 400mm x 44mm Give and take TM Opposite number 2 (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 22nd June
item.description:
FW Abrupt Level Difference 6000mm x 400mm x 70mm Give and take TM Opposite number 2 (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown Verge on Pavement, 22nd June
item.description:
The verge on the B4632 between Cockcbury Court and Rushbury is becoming very overgrown, narrowing the pavement and obstructing visibility when crossing the road. A small section was cut a little while ago when the whole of that section required maintenance.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): B4632, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 22nd June
item.description:
CW Pothole 500mm x 400mm x 41mm 3 x NSD Give and take TM Outside number 15 (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 22nd June
item.description:
Please pass to relevant ahr covering this area. Please send first vegetation letter to relevant landowner of Willow trees at end of Tivoli Street.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large overhanging willow tree needs pollarding/cutting back. Footpath rear No 10 Merestones Drive, Cheltenham, 22nd June
item.description:
Homeowner 10 Merestones Drive. Tree overhanging public footpath and taking light from garden. Possible danger of falling.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Saint Michaels Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 22nd June
item.description:
Give and take 28 day please lift and relay x2 rocking 400x400x16mm tactile slabs temporary footway closure (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 22nd June
item.description:
Give and take 28 day please lift and relay x1 rocking 900x600x25mm slabs temporary footway closure (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 22nd June
item.description:
ENWD PLEASE CUT BACK VEGETATION TO BOUNDARY 20M STANDARD TM WITH FOOTWAY CLOSURE MARKED (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 22nd June
item.description:
3 way traffic lights 28 day please lift and relay x1 sunken rocking gully frame and cover 460x460x40mm stats required (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 22nd June
item.description:
